apps.name: AYS2
apps.subtitle: PlayStation 2 emulator for iPhone & iPad
apps.localizedDescription: AYS2 is a PlayStation 2 emulator for iPhone and iPad. Load your own PS2 BIOS and disc images (.iso / .chd) and play with full-speed JIT via a JIT enabler such as StikDebug. See each update's "What's New" for the latest changes.

versions.localizedDescription:
What's new in v0.1.157:
• Latest development build.
• Performance improvements
• Bug fixes and stability enhancements
